content: Hey, I'm so excited for the weekend. I get to take my dog, Max, to the park in Pittsburgh.
That sounds like a great plan! How long have you had Max?
I've had him for about 3 years now. I got him when I was still living in the Bay Area, but we moved to Pittsburgh about a year ago for my job as a Fashion Buyer.
I'm sure the change of scenery has been interesting for both you and Max. What do you like to do in your free time?
I'm really into DJing and speedcubing. I find that they help me relax after a long day of work. I've also recently gotten into drone photography, which is a lot of fun.
That's really cool. I've never met anyone who is into speedcubing before. How did you get into it?
I actually learned about it from a friend, Alex, who is really into it. We would often meet up and try to solve the cube as fast as we could. Now, I'm trying to get my time under 20 seconds.
That's impressive. Do you have any other pets besides Max?
No, just Max. But I do have a few fish in an aquarium that I'm really fond of. I've been thinking about getting a cat, but I'm not sure if it would get along with Max.
Introducing a new pet to the household can be challenging. You might want to consider talking to a pet behaviorist before making a decision.
That's a great idea. I'll have to look into that. By the way, I'm thinking about entering a speedcubing competition on October 15th. Wish me luck!
Good luck with the competition! I'm sure you'll do great. Have you been practicing regularly?
Yeah, I try to practice for at least an hour every day. I've also been watching some tutorials online to learn new techniques.
It's great that you're dedicated to improving your skills. Maybe one day you can teach me some speedcubing tricks.
Ha! I'd be happy to teach you. Maybe after the competition, we can set up a time for me to show you some basics.
Sounds like a plan. I'll have to remind you about it after October 15th.
Looking forward to it. Anyway, I should get going. I have a meeting with my colleague, Samantha, to discuss some new fashion trends.
It was great chatting with you. Have a great meeting and good luck with your meeting and the speedcubing competition!
